visualizations.title: Anatomy of Addition
visualizations.description: The parts of an addition equation: addends and their combined sum.

steps.explanation: Addends: The quantities or numbers being combined together.
Plus Sign: The symbol representing the operation of addition.
Sum: The total result obtained after combining the addends.

visualizations.title: Interactive Number Line Addition (4 + 3 = 7)
visualizations.description: Visualizing addition as moving steps to the right on a number line.
